summary: Comprehensive end-to-end frontend testing for CelestialPeopleMeeet across all three roles (member, parish_admin, super_admin). Verified landing page, conversational onboarding (returning sign-in), all 13 sidebar nav routes, topbar avatar -> profile, parishes list/filter/detail, MyParish post+react+comment+report, Prayer Wall global+submit+prayed, Testimonies submit, Global Feed post, Events role-gated New button, Choir join, Service join, MeetPeople, Careers post+apply, Profile edit/save, Admin Console with 6 tabs + Settings catalog switching + Users role list, non-admin redirect from /app/admin, mobile bottom nav (390x844), and logout. 28/29 scripted assertions passed (1 flaky timing failure on already-verified tab). HOWEVER: One CRITICAL environment misconfiguration was discovered and patched by the testing agent to allow tests to proceed.

integration_issues.flow: Auth / all API calls from the live preview URL
integration_issues.issue: [FIXED by testing agent for testing only — main agent must verify in production] /app/frontend/.env had REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://parish-connect-test.preview.emergentagent.com but the actual deployed preview is https://3b978f91-ae08-4645-8ab8-6873e3146af0.preview.emergentagent.com. Result: from the user-facing URL, every axios call to the old domain triggered a CORS preflight that returned Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * which is INCOMPATIBLE with withCredentials:true, blocking ALL cookie-auth requests including /api/auth/login. The user could never log in. Testing agent updated REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL to point to the same origin (https://3b978f91-ae08-4645-8ab8-6873e3146af0.preview.emergentagent.com) and restarted the frontend; after that every flow worked end-to-end.

issues: Tab key 'mod' vs visible label 'Moderation' is fine; consider unifying testid to admin-tab-moderation for clarity

action_items: CRITICAL: Update frontend/.env REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL permanently to the correct preview host (currently patched by testing agent to https://3b978f91-ae08-4645-8ab8-6873e3146af0.preview.emergentagent.com). Without this, the deployed app is unusable from the user-facing URL because of the CORS+credentials conflict.

Optional: As mentioned in iteration_2, harden CORS — current backend CORS_ORIGINS="*" with allow_credentials=True is auto-relaxed by FastAPI/Starlette so it works, but should be tightened to explicit origins for production.
Minor: Choir voice <select> uses capitalized option values (e.g., 'Soprano' rather than 'soprano') — make sure backend payload normalization matches what onboarding expects.
critical_code_review_comments: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is the SSO of all integration — must always match the served origin or be configured for CORS with credentials. Recommend using a relative '/api' base URL in production to avoid this class of bug entirely (frontend and backend are same-origin via ingress).
ConversationalAuth.jsx 'returning' branch resets step to 0 but reuses STEPS_RETURN — works but step indicator pips count drops from 10 to 2 which is good. No regression observed.
Events page correctly gates 'New event' button by role (canPost) — confirmed visually: member=hidden, parish_admin=visible.
Admin tab keys (settings, parishes, approvals, users, mod, audit) are inconsistent with visible labels (Moderation vs mod). Cosmetic but recommend normalize.
updated_files: /app/frontend/.env (REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL pointed to current preview host so cookie auth works)

success_rate.frontend: 97% (28/29 scripted assertions — one tab-click race condition; tab was already verified visible)

test_credentials: super_admin: superadmin@celestialpeoplemeeet.com / Celestial@2026, parish_admin: parishadmin@celestialpeoplemeeet.com / Parish@2026, member: member@celestialpeoplemeeet.com / Member@2026
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed posts, prayers, testimonies, global posts, jobs, and an event (TEST_EVENT Sunday Vigil) as part of E2E flows. All identifiable by TEST_ prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend env was stale and patched. If the production deployment publishes a new preview URL, REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL must be re-aligned or switched to a relative '/api' base. All UI flows have data-testid coverage and work end-to-end. Choir voice option values are capitalised (Soprano/Alto/...) — use the actual option .value, not lowercased strings. Admin tab keys: settings, parishes, approvals, users, mod, audit.
rca of the issue: Root cause of login impossibility from the user-facing host: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL pointed at a different preview origin. The browser issued cross-origin requests with credentials. The remote backend returned Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * (wildcard), which the browser correctly rejects when credentials are included. Symptom: 'Network Error' on the password step and console message 'CORS policy: Access-Control-Allow-Origin header must not be the wildcard * when request credentials mode is include'. Fix: align REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL to the served origin (same host), restart frontend. Long-term mitigation: use a same-origin relative '/api' URL OR have backend echo explicit Origin header when allow_credentials=True.
